entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 20
entries.excerpt: To the end, a psalm of David. This is a well-known title; and it is not Christ who speaks; but the prophet speaks to Christ, under the form of wishing, foretelling things to come. The Lord hear You in the day of trouble Psalm 19:1. The Lord hear You in the day in which Thou said, Father glorify Your Son. The name of the God of Jacob protect You. For to You belongs the younger people. Since the elder shall serve the younger. Send You help from the Holy, and from Sion defend You Psalm 19:2. Making for You a sanctified Body, the Church, from watching safe, which waits when You shall come from…
